name: Clockwork Bracers

effects.description: Can be triggered to lock and stiffen, granting resistance to being grappled or restrained for 1 minute.

description: A pair of articulated bracers with hidden gears and springs. Used by escape artists and inventors.

artwork.caption: Intricate metal bracers with visible gears.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Bracers of Defense', reimagined for science.
